name: Meagan Oneil
ai_summary: Meagan Oneil has approximately four years of childcare experience with two children of her own and expresses a genuine love for working with kids. Located in Tucson, AZ with a 30-mile drive availability, she is seeking full-time work and demonstrates conflict resolution skills through listening and finding middle ground.

transcripts.q3:
Hi, my name is Megan O'Neill, and I have probably about four years of experience with two children, and I have two kids of my own and I just love working with kids. I, I think they're so fun and they have such like a blank slate, and that you can teach them so much in different ways. And I think it's just a really fun thing.
 Thing to do.
transcripts.q4: I'm located in Tucson, Arizona, and probably 30 miles would be a good distance for me.
transcripts.q5: I'm looking for full-time and eight to about 44, 30 would be a perfect schedule for me.
transcripts.q6:
when dealing with two kids that have a conflict, I will listen to both sides and try to come up with a
 A middle ground, where both sides are happy and just go from there.
transcripts.q7: I think I would be a good teacher because I'm very caring and understanding and I always try to do better and I tried to teach the kids as much as I can and as much as they're able to and I think I would just be a good asset.
